# Leo VI's Mass Vassal Directives - rule editor scripted GUIs
#
# GENERATED by tools/gen_panel.sh - edits here will be overwritten.
#
# Choosing an option runs two of these in order: a focus, which points a cursor
# at the node being edited, then a set, which writes one field to whatever the
# cursor points at. That split is what keeps this file to one entry per node
# plus one per option, instead of one per node-and-option pair - GUI cannot hand
# script a number, so the node cannot simply be an argument.
#
# None of these need is_shown: a control reads its own state straight from the
# variable it represents.

### Priority 1 nodes.
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n1 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 11 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n2 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 12 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n3 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 13 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n4 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 14 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n5 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 15 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n6 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 16 } }
}
leo_mvd_focus_r1_n7 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_focus_effect = { CODE = 17 } }
}

### Adding and removing priorities.
leo_mvd_add_priority = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_add_priority_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_priority_1 = {
	scope = character
	# Never down to nothing: a rule set with no priorities is None.
	is_valid = { var:leo_mvd_rule_count > 1 }
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_priority_1_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_priority_2 = {
	scope = character
	# Never down to nothing: a rule set with no priorities is None.
	is_valid = { var:leo_mvd_rule_count > 1 }
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_priority_2_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_priority_3 = {
	scope = character
	# Never down to nothing: a rule set with no priorities is None.
	is_valid = { var:leo_mvd_rule_count > 1 }
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_priority_3_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_priority_4 = {
	scope = character
	# Never down to nothing: a rule set with no priorities is None.
	is_valid = { var:leo_mvd_rule_count > 1 }
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_priority_4_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_priority_5 = {
	scope = character
	# Never down to nothing: a rule set with no priorities is None.
	is_valid = { var:leo_mvd_rule_count > 1 }
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_priority_5_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_priority_6 = {
	scope = character
	# Never down to nothing: a rule set with no priorities is None.
	is_valid = { var:leo_mvd_rule_count > 1 }
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_priority_6_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_add_qpriority = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_add_qpriority_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_qpriority_1 = {
	scope = character
	# This one may empty: a realm with no nomads has no use for it.
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_qpriority_1_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_qpriority_2 = {
	scope = character
	# This one may empty: a realm with no nomads has no use for it.
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_qpriority_2_effect = yes }
}
leo_mvd_remove_qpriority_3 = {
	scope = character
	# This one may empty: a realm with no nomads has no use for it.
	effect = { leo_mvd_remove_qpriority_3_effect = yes }
}

### Node kind.
leo_mvd_set_kind_0 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 1 VALUE = 0 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_kind_1 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 1 VALUE = 1 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_kind_2 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 1 VALUE = 2 } }
}

### Conditions. Each also sets a sensible threshold, so that a numeric
### condition is never left sitting at a value it has no label for.
leo_mvd_set_cond_1 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 1 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_2 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 2 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_3 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 3 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_4 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 4 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_5 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 5 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_19 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 19 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_6 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 6 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_20 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 20 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 3 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_7 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 7 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_8 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 8 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_9 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 9 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 1000 }
	}
}

	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 10 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 3 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_11 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 11 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 40 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_12 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 12 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 50 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_13 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 13 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 3 }
	}
}
leo_mvd_set_cond_14 = {
	scope = character
	effect = {
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 2 VALUE = 14 }
		leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 50 }
	}
}

### Thresholds. Shared by value across conditions; only labels differ.
leo_mvd_set_thresh_0 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 0 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_thresh_1 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 1 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_thresh_2 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 2 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_thresh_3 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 3 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_thresh_4 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 4 } }

	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 5 } }
}

	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 6 } }

	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 10 } }

	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 20 } }
}

	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 25 } }
}

	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 3 VALUE = 40 } }

### Directives.
leo_mvd_set_dir_1 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 1 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_2 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 2 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_3 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 3 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_4 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 4 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_5 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 5 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_6 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 6 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_7 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 7 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_8 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 8 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_9 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 9 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_10 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 10 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_11 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 11 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_12 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 12 } }
}
leo_mvd_set_dir_13 = {
	scope = character
	effect = { leo_mvd_edit_effect = { FIELD = 4 VALUE = 13 } }
}
